stories.title: Roland Garros Men's Final — Zverev vs Cobolli (TODAY, 3 PM Paris / 9 AM ET)
stories.angle: The Roland Garros men's final is today — Alexander Zverev (0-3 in Grand Slam finals) faces Flavio Cobolli (first GS final) on Court Philippe-Chatrier; one of them wins their first major title; Zverev leads H2H 3-1 but Cobolli beat him in Munich 2026; first men's Grand Slam champion who is a first-time winner since Jannik Sinner at AO 2024

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Roland Garros men's final is today.

Zverev vs Cobolli. 3 PM Paris / 9 AM ET. Philippe-Chatrier.

One of them wins their first Grand Slam title.

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW-UP (men's final preview covered June 6; today is match day)

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Zverev's Grand Slam final record before today:

2020 US Open — lost to Thiem in five sets
2024 Roland Garros — lost to Alcaraz in four sets
2025 Australian Open — lost to Sinner in three sets

Today is his fourth chance. #RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #ATPTour
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW-UP (men's final preview covered June 6; today is match day)

stories.title: Andreeva Wins Roland Garros 2026 Women's Title — 6-3, 6-3 Over Chwalinska
stories.angle: Mirra Andreeva defeated Maja Chwalinska 6-3, 6-3 yesterday to claim her first Grand Slam title; at 19 years and 38 days she is the youngest Roland Garros champion since Monica Seles in 1992; first Russian woman to win Roland Garros since Sharapova 2014; trailed 2-3 in first set before winning 10 straight games; coached by former world No. 2 and RG 2000 finalist Conchita Martinez

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Mirra Andreeva is a Grand Slam champion. 🏆

6-3, 6-3 over Chwalinska in the Roland Garros women's final.

At 19 years and 38 days, she's the youngest Roland Garros champion since Monica Seles in 1992.

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #WTA
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW-UP (women's final preview covered June 6; result available today)

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Down 2-3 in the first set of the Roland Garros final.

Andreeva won TEN STRAIGHT GAMES to claim the title.

First Russian woman to win Roland Garros since Sharapova in 2014.

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #WTA
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW-UP (women's final preview covered June 6; result available today)

stories.title: Roland Garros 2026 — A Fortnight for the Record Books
stories.angle: Roland Garros 2026 ends with the men's final today; the tournament produced historic moments throughout: Chwalinska became the first qualifier ever in a Roland Garros final; Andreeva is the youngest RG women's champion since Seles 1992; Cobolli became the first Italian man in a Grand Slam final since Adriano Panatta in 1976; Arnaldi's walkover was only the 4th in Open Era Grand Slam SF history; first all-Italian men's GS SF; Sinner, Alcaraz, and Djokovic all absent from the final week

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Roland Garros 2026 — a tournament for the record books:

Chwalinska: First qualifier in RG women's final history
Andreeva: Youngest RG champion since Seles (1992)
Cobolli: First Italian GS finalist since Panatta (1976)

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Four walkovers in Open Era Grand Slam SF history.

Arnaldi's viral illness withdrawal at Roland Garros 2026 was the fourth.

The first all-Italian men's GS SF in history ended before a ball was struck.

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen

article.headline: Roland Garros 2026 Was One for the History Books — Every Record That Fell This Fortnight

stories.title: Grass Court Season Preview — Stuttgart Opens Monday
stories.angle: With Roland Garros complete, tennis pivots to grass; Stuttgart (June 8-14) opens the clay-to-grass transition with Fritz, Berrettini, Kyrgios, and Mensik among confirmed players; s-Hertogenbosch and the HSBC Championships at Queen's Club in London follow; Wimbledon is the crown jewel of the grass season coming later in June; the surface switch happens in six days and demands immediate tactical adjustments

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Roland Garros is over. Wimbledon season begins.

Stuttgart opens Monday (June 8) — Fritz, Berrettini, Kyrgios, and Mensik all in the field.

Clay to grass in six days. 🌱

#TennisFanrecap #Wimbledon #ATPTour

stories.title: Andreeva's New Normal — What It Means to Win Your First Grand Slam at 19
stories.angle: Andreeva enters the post-Roland Garros world as a Grand Slam champion; she is the first Russian woman to hold this title at a Slam since Sharapova; she is coached by Conchita Martinez, who reached the Roland Garros final herself in 2000; at 19 she has won her first Slam in just her second Roland Garros semifinal appearance; ranking implications — she was No. 8 entering the tournament, a title adds significant points

x_posts.label: Post 5-1
x_posts.text:
Andreeva is a Grand Slam champion at 19.

The youngest Roland Garros winner since Monica Seles. The first Russian woman to win here since Sharapova in 2014.

Coached by Conchita Martinez — the woman who reached this same final in 2000.

#TennisFanrecap #WTA #RolandGarros

x_posts.label: Post 5-2
x_posts.text:
Andreeva on winning Roland Garros at 19:

She trailed 2-3 in the first set. Then won 10 straight games.

That's not luck. That's a champion in the making.

#TennisFanrecap #WTA #RolandGarros

article.headline: What It Means to Win a Grand Slam at 19: Mirra Andreeva's New Normal After Roland Garros
